jobs.name: Sync Finances
jobs.description: Pull latest transactions and balances from Plaid and Schwab via data-api

payload.message: Execute financial data sync. Call POST http://data-api:8000/finance/sync with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. Report only if errors occur. Do not deliver results to any channel.

jobs.name: Sync Calendar
jobs.description: Sync Google Calendar and Outlook events via data-api

payload.message: Execute calendar sync. Call POST http://data-api:8000/calendar/sync with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. Report only if errors occur.

jobs.name: Sync LMS
jobs.description: Sync Canvas and Blackboard assignments and grades

payload.message: Execute LMS sync covering Canvas and Blackboard. Call POST http://data-api:8000/lms/sync with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. Report only if errors occur.

jobs.name: Sync Health
jobs.description: Process Garmin and Apple Health data via data-api

payload.message: Execute health data sync. Call POST http://data-api:8000/health/sync with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. Report only if errors occur.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing
jobs.description: Generate and deliver the daily morning briefing at 6 AM ET

payload.message: Generate the morning briefing for Zakir. Call GET http://data-api:8000/briefing/today with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. The response contains structured briefing data. Summarize it into 3-5 concise bullet points covering: (1) today's calendar and deadlines, (2) financial alerts if any, (3) health metrics vs goals (175g protein, 1900 cal), (4) anything requiring immediate action. Keep it under 200 words. Deliver via WhatsApp.

jobs.name: Generate Content
jobs.description: Create daily LinkedIn and X thought-leadership posts at 7 AM ET

payload.message: Generate today's thought-leadership content. Call POST http://data-api:8000/content/generate with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN} and body {"platform": "linkedin", "topic": "auto", "style": "thought_leader", "user_id": "default"}. Announce what was generated with a brief summary of the post topics. If any posts failed to publish, report the errors.

jobs.name: Weekly Digest
jobs.description: Generate and deliver the weekly summary report on Sunday at 8 PM ET

payload.message: Generate the weekly digest. Call GET http://data-api:8000/briefing/weekly with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. Summarize the weekly data into a concise report covering: spending trends, assignment completion rates, health goal adherence, content performance metrics, and key recommendations for the coming week. Deliver via WhatsApp.

jobs.name: Sync Spotify
jobs.description: Pull recently played tracks and top artist/track snapshots from Spotify

payload.message: Execute Spotify listening history sync. Call POST http://data-api:8000/spotify/sync with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN}. Report only if errors occur.

jobs.name: Weekly Security Audit
jobs.description: Run security audit check every Monday at 9 AM ET

payload.message: Perform the weekly security audit. Call GET http://data-api:8000/audit/verify with header Authorization: Bearer ${DATA_API_TOKEN} to verify audit log integrity. Then call GET http://data-api:8000/budget/usage with the same auth to check LLM budget status. Report any anomalies: tampered audit entries, budget threshold breaches, or unusual patterns. Keep the report concise and actionable.
